full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me implement DP-means from Algorithm 1 in Kulis & Jordan 2012 in Python from scratch, with comments citing the exact algorithm line numbers.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided an initial implementation structure which I then verified against Algorithm 1 line by line.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Compared every code block to Algorithm 1 in the paper and rewrote comments to match exact line numbers.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How should I choose the lambda value for DP-means on a make_blobs dataset with 4 clusters and cluster_std=0.8? What range should I scan?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested scanning lambda over an order of magnitude and choosing smallest value that recovers true k.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Ran the scan myself (lambda from 1.5 to 50) and confirmed lambda=15 is the right choice empirically.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: For each code block in my DP-means implementation, help me write a 2-3 sentence markdown annotation that cites the specific equation or algorithm step from the paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Drafted initial annotations which I then edited to be more specific to Algorithm 1 line numbers.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Revised every annotation by re-reading the paper section it references.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Rewrote all annotations in my own words with more specific paper references.
